title: Targeted proteomics data interpretation with DeepMRM.
author: Park J Wilkins C Avtonomov D Hong J Back S Kim H Shulman N MacLean BX Lee SW Kim S
content: S-EPMC10391571 PMC10391571 Targeted proteomics data interpretation with DeepMRM. Targeted proteomics is widely utilized in clinical proteomics; however, researchers often devote substantial time to manual data interpretation, which hinders the transferability, reproducibility, and scalability
